# Auto-Editor 31.2.0 notice

Gapless pins Auto-Editor 31.2.0 (upstream tag commit
`576d6b1ecc5a86ebf4507e35e44b2f9d6fb824a5`) and distributes separately built
release executables for the targets recorded in `assets/engine/manifest.json`.

Auto-Editor source is released under the Unlicense/public-domain dedication:

> This is free and unencumbered software released into the public domain.

The full upstream license is available at
<https://github.com/WyattBlue/auto-editor/blob/31.2.0/LICENSE>.

The upstream release executables bundle multimedia dependencies, including
FFmpeg components. Packaging must retain the license files and source/build
offers produced for each release target; this notice does not replace those
per-artifact obligations or the release SBOM.
